title: FEE DETAILS 2026-27 ADMISSIONS (INDIAN STUDENTS)
content: FEE DETAILS 2026-27 ADMISSIONS (INDIAN STUDENTS) 1 Undergraduate Course - BTech (All Courses) First Year Second Year Third Year Fourth Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem 5th Sem 6th Sem 7th Sem 8th Sem Tuition Fees 164550 164550 172800 172800 181450 181450 190550 190550 Tuition Fees (NRI-USD Per Year) 7800 8200 8700 9100 2 Undergraduate Course - BBA First Year Second Year Third Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem 5th Sem 6th Sem Tuition Fees 82550 82550 86700 86700 91050 91050 3 Undergraduate Course - BCA First Year Second Year Third Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem 5th Sem 6th Sem Tuition Fees 82550 82550 86700 86700 91050 91050 4 Undergraduate Course - BSc (Forensic Science) First Year Second Year Third Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem 5th Sem 6th Sem Tuition Fees 70000 70000 73500 73500 77200 77200 5 Postgraduate Course - MTech First Year Second Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem Tuition Fees 74850 74850 78600 78600 6 Postgraduate Course - MBA First Year Second Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem Tuition Fees 162500 162500 170650 170650 7 Postgraduate Course - MSc First Year Second Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem Tuition Fees (Semester-Wise) 52300 52300 54950 54950 8 Doctoral Course - PhD First Year Second Year Third Year Fourth Year 1st Sem 2nd Sem 3rd Sem 4th Sem 5th Sem 6th Sem 7th Sem 8th Sem Tuition Fees 32450 32450 34100 34100 35850 35850 37650 37650 9. Caution Money: Rs. 20,000/- (Common to all Programmes) - One time & Refundable upon completion of Programme. 10. Admission Charges: BTech-Rs. 25,000/-, BBA/MTech/MBA-Rs. 15,000/-, BCA/BSc/MSc- Rs. 10,000/- (One time at the time of admission & Non Refundable). 11. Hostel Charges: Rs. 84,000/- per Semester for double occupancy & Rs. 8,000/- per sem extra for single occupancy, USD 2310/- per Annum (NRI/NRI Sponsered). 12. 30% Consession in BTech Tuition Fees to wards of serving & Ex Armed & PMF Personnel getting admission on 10% reserved seats for the category. 13. 35% Consession in BTech Tuition Fees to wards of Veer Naris (War Widows) & Persones with disabilities (PWD) during action. 14. Upto 50% waiver in MSc Tuition Fee to 10 meritorious candidates per department as per their merit. 15. Merit-Based Scholarship of up to 40% on BTech Programs (Excluding BTech CSE & its three specializations, BTech AI-ML, BTech AI-DS and BTech IT).
